title: Starlink Hits Pause on Extra $10 Rental Kit Fee for Dish Hardware
summary: The $10 "monthly kit fee" that Starlink introduced for new Residential sign-ups has quietly been rescinded. But the mysterious "rental adjustment" might cause some confusion, since it’s unclear whether the $10 fee waiver applies only to the first month of service.
